questions.text: Carbon forms how many covalent bonds?
questions.explanation: Carbon has valency 4, meaning it forms 4 covalent bonds to complete its octet. This property is called tetravalency.

questions.text: Diamond is a good conductor of electricity.
questions.explanation: Diamond is a poor conductor of electricity because all electrons are involved in bonding. Graphite is a good conductor.

questions.correctAnswer: The ability of carbon atoms to form bonds with other carbon atoms.
questions.explanation: Catenation is the unique property of carbon to form long chains and rings by bonding with other carbon atoms.
-COOH is the carboxyl group found in carboxylic acids like ethanoic acid (CH₃COOH).
